features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-3986: URI syntax for HTTP, HTTPS, WS, WSS, and request-target metadata
features.title: Conformance target RFC-3986

features.description: Row-level conformance target WHATWG-URL: Browser URL parsing, serialization, and URL API behavior
features.title: Conformance target WHATWG-URL

features.description: Row-level conformance target WHATWG-FETCH: Browser request/response processing and fetch-backed streams
features.title: Conformance target WHATWG-FETCH

features.description: Row-level conformance target WHATWG-ENCODING: Text encoding boundaries, including SSE UTF-8 and WebSocket text
features.title: Conformance target WHATWG-ENCODING

features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-9110: HTTP semantics for request, response, REST, JSON-RPC over HTTP, streaming HTTP, SSE, and pathsend responses
features.title: Conformance target RFC-9110

features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-9112: HTTP/1.1 wire message framing
features.title: Conformance target RFC-9112

features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-9113: HTTP/2 streams and framing
features.title: Conformance target RFC-9113

features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-9114: HTTP/3 streams and framing
features.title: Conformance target RFC-9114

features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-8446: TLS 1.3 security layer for HTTPS, WSS, WebTransport, and ASGI TLS metadata
features.title: Conformance target RFC-8446

features.title: Conformance target RFC-5280

features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-6125: Service identity verification for TLS peer identity
features.title: Conformance target RFC-6125

features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-4514: Distinguished-name string representation in TLS certificate metadata
features.title: Conformance target RFC-4514

features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-8259: JSON payload and JSON framing surfaces
features.title: Conformance target RFC-8259

features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-8785: Canonical JSON when deterministic JSON serialization is required
features.title: Conformance target RFC-8785

features.description: Row-level conformance target JSON-RPC-2.0: JSON-RPC request, response, notification, and error object semantics
features.title: Conformance target JSON-RPC-2.0

features.description: Row-level conformance target WHATWG-HTML-SSE: EventSource and text/event-stream parsing behavior
features.title: Conformance target WHATWG-HTML-SSE

features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-6455: WebSocket handshake, frames, close, ping, pong, text, bytes, and message semantics
features.title: Conformance target RFC-6455

features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-8441: WebSocket bootstrapping over HTTP/2
features.title: Conformance target RFC-8441

features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-9220: WebSocket bootstrapping over HTTP/3
features.title: Conformance target RFC-9220

features.description: Row-level conformance target WHATWG-WEBSOCKETS: Browser WebSocket API lifecycle and events
features.title: Conformance target WHATWG-WEBSOCKETS

features.description: Row-level conformance target WHATWG-STREAMS: Browser ReadableStream and WritableStream behavior
features.title: Conformance target WHATWG-STREAMS

features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-9000: QUIC connection and stream primitives, including reset and stop-sending semantics
features.title: Conformance target RFC-9000

features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-9221: QUIC unreliable DATAGRAM extension
features.title: Conformance target RFC-9221

features.description: Row-level conformance target RFC-9297: HTTP Datagrams and Capsule Protocol
features.title: Conformance target RFC-9297

features.description: Row-level conformance target IETF-WEBTRANS-OVERVIEW-12: WebTransport abstract protocol framework, sessions, streams, and datagrams
features.title: Conformance target IETF-WEBTRANS-OVERVIEW-12

features.title: Conformance target IETF-WEBTRANS-HTTP3-15

features.title: Conformance target IETF-WEBTRANS-HTTP2-14

features.title: Conformance target W3C-WEBTRANSPORT-20260311

features.title: Conformance target ASGI-MAIN

features.title: Conformance target ASGI-HTTP-WEBSOCKET

features.title: Conformance target ASGI-EXTENSIONS

features.title: Conformance target GRPC-HTTP2

features.title: Conformance target RFC-4648
